name: claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills for development tasks and Claude extension authoring: engineering discipline, testing, code quality, documentation, tooling, and content analysis. Install everything via all-skills or pick individual skills.

plugins.name: all-skills
plugins.description: All 41 skills from thedavidmurray/claude-skills: engineering discipline, testing, code quality, documentation, tooling, content analysis, research, planning, and frontend engineering.

plugins.name: commit-hygiene
plugins.description: Enforce commit size thresholds and conventional commit messages to reduce defect rates

plugins.name: test-driven-development
plugins.description: Enforce strict RED-GREEN-REFACTOR TDD discipline before writing production code

plugins.name: precommit-validation
plugins.description: Pre-commit security and quality validation

plugins.name: test-runner
plugins.description: Run tests, generate scaffolds, manage coverage with framework auto-detection

plugins.name: prd-to-criteria
plugins.description: Transform PRD acceptance criteria into machine-verifiable completion checks

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Code review covering security, performance, quality, and correctness

plugins.name: diagnose
plugins.description: Disciplined six-phase debugging loop for hard bugs and performance regressions

plugins.name: dev-docs
plugins.description: Generate README, API docs, ADRs, and inline documentation

plugins.name: make-interfaces-feel-better
plugins.description: UI polish: animations, typography, surfaces, micro-interactions

plugins.name: mcp-server-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffold production-ready MCP servers with TypeScript/Python templates

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Guide for creating and structuring new Claude Code skills

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Prompt engineering patterns for LLM agents and hooks

plugins.name: link-ingest
plugins.description: Ingest any URL into a knowledge base with scraping, Obsidian notes, and optional ChromaDB

plugins.name: file-organizer
plugins.description: Organize files, find duplicates, suggest better structures

plugins.name: csv-summarizer
plugins.description: Analyze CSV files and generate statistical summaries with charts

plugins.name: image-enhancer
plugins.description: Batch image enhancement with ImageMagick and platform presets

plugins.name: changelog-generator
plugins.description: Generate release notes from git history

plugins.name: article-extractor
plugins.description: Extract clean article content with a 4-backend fallback chain

plugins.name: claude-md-author
plugins.description: Write and audit CLAUDE.md memory files Claude actually follows

plugins.name: hook-creator
plugins.description: Create and debug Claude Code hooks that enforce rules deterministically

plugins.name: subagent-creator
plugins.description: Create custom Claude Code subagents with scoped tools and prompts

plugins.name: refactor-safely
plugins.description: Behavior-preserving refactoring under a test safety net, in small reversible steps

plugins.name: git-rescue
plugins.description: Recover lost commits, undo bad rebases/merges, and hunt regressions with bisect

plugins.name: a11y-review
plugins.description: Accessibility review for web UIs against checkable WCAG 2.2 AA rules

plugins.name: dependency-upgrade
plugins.description: Safe, ordered dependency upgrades across npm, pip, and cargo

plugins.name: autoreason
plugins.description: Apply structured reasoning frameworks to complex problems with decomposition, evidence, synthesis, and verification

plugins.name: autoresearcher
plugins.description: Autonomous deep research with parallel evidence gathering and cited synthesis across web and local sources

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: Deep investigation and evidence gathering for academic, technical, and market research with cited summaries

plugins.name: goal-loop
plugins.description: Self-evaluating goal loop for autonomous task execution with bounded retry

plugins.name: writing-plans
plugins.description: Create comprehensive implementation plans from specs or requirements

plugins.name: verification-loop
plugins.description: Comprehensive verification system for software development sessions

plugins.name: proof-of-completion
plugins.description: Structured proof-of-completion framework for verifiable task delivery

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Systematic debugging workflow for software defects with reproduce-isolate-fix-verify discipline

plugins.name: tdd-workflow
plugins.description: Enforce test-driven development with RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline

plugins.name: testing-reference
plugins.description: Testing conventions, quality gates, coverage requirements, and naming patterns

plugins.name: e2e-testing
plugins.description: Playwright end-to-end testing patterns with Page Object Model and CI integration

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Browser automation using Playwright for navigation, scraping, testing, and web automation

plugins.name: browser-automation-patterns
plugins.description: Reliable browser automation patterns for web UI tasks

plugins.name: web-dev-ops
plugins.description: Operate web projects end-to-end: audit, deploy, verify live URLs

plugins.name: frontend-patterns
plugins.description: Frontend development patterns for React, Next.js, state management, and performance

plugins.name: nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js 14+ app router, server components, API routes, and deployment patterns
